query:
SELECT p.id,
       p.productCode,
       p.batchNo,
       p.serialNumber,
       p.imei,
       p.productName,
       p.importedVendorName,
       c.name AS category_name,
       p.sheetRowNumber,
       p.currentStationCode,
       p.currentStatus
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_categories c ON c.id = p.categoryId
WHERE p.batchNo = '01900000012'
LIMIT 1;
